nasb.text: Therefore I, the prisoner of the Lord, implore you to walk in a manner worthy of the calling with which you have been called,

esv.text: I therefore, a prisoner for the Lord, urge you to walk in a manner worthy of the calling to which you have been called,

cnv.text: 因此，我這為主被囚禁的勸你們：行事為人，要配得上你們所蒙的呼召，

ccb.text: 所以，我这为主被囚禁的劝你们，既然蒙了上帝的呼召，就要过与所蒙的呼召相称的生活。

csbs.text: 所以，我这个在主里的囚犯劝你们：行事为人要配得上你们所蒙的召唤，
